data.title: Victoria's Secret & Co. (NYSE: VSCO) to hold Q2 2025 earnings call on Aug 28 at 8:30 am, with results to be released an hour prior. Website: victoriassecretandco.com/investors.
data.description: On August 7, 2025, Reynoldsburg, Ohio - Victoria’s Secret & Co. (NYSE: VSCO) will be releasing its second quarter 2025 earnings before the market opens on August 28th. A live webcast of the conference call with company executives is scheduled for the same day at 8:30 a.m. ET. The detailed financial information of the second quarter results will be released one hour before the webcast. Investors can access the earnings release and financial details on the company's official website at victoriassecretandco.com/investors.

data.title: Pagaya Technologies Ltd. (NASDAQ: PGY) reports Q2 and first half of 2025 results. 3Q25 Network Volume expected $2.75B-$2.95B.
data.description: Pagaya Technologies Ltd. (NASDAQ: PGY) revealed its financial results for the second quarter and the first half of 2025, showcasing their AI technology for finances. The company expects the 3Q25 Network Volume to range between $2.75 billion and $2.95 billion. More details can be found in Pagaya's second quarter 2025 shareholder letter.

data.title: WK Kellogg Co released its Q2 2025 financial results. Link to press release: https://investor.wkkellogg.com/news-events/events-and-presentations/default.aspx.
data.description: In Battle Creek, Michigan on August 7, 2025, WK Kellogg Co (NYSE: KLG) shared its financial performance for the second quarter of 2025 through a press release on their official website. The detailed report can be accessed at https://investor.wkkellogg.com/news-events/events-and-presentations/default.aspx. The company's results include key figures on revenue, profit, and other financial metrics, showcasing their performance during this period.

data.title: DERMALOG JENETRIC launches mobile palm scanner LIVETOUCH PALM in the US at 2025 IAI Conference, offering on-site biometric identification for law enforcement.
data.description: During the 2025 IAI Conference held in Orlando, DERMALOG JENETRIC introduced the LIVETOUCH PALM, an ultra-compact biometric identification device. This innovative product offers mobility, durability, and user-friendly operation, presenting new opportunities for on-site identification in law enforcement. The company is based in HAMBURG and JENA, Germany.

data.title: Sapiens' UnderwritingPro recognized as top provider in Life/Annuity/Benefits Systems 2025 report. #SPNS #TASE
data.description: Sapiens UnderwritingPro has been acknowledged as a top performer in the "Life/Annuity/Benefits New Business and Underwriting Systems, 2025" report. The company, based in Rochelle Park, N.J., stands out in this category. Sapiens International Corporation, listed on NASDAQ as SPNS and on TASE as SPNS, is a leading global provider known for its intelligent solutions.

data.title: Muon Space reveals XL Satellite Platform, with Hubble Network as 1st customer. Aug 7, 2025 - Mountain View. #satellite #technology #news
data.description: The recent launch of MuSat XL marks a significant advancement in satellite technology, enhancing the performance of Hubble's worldwide BLE network. Based in MOUNTAIN VIEW, Calif., the company behind this achievement is Muon Space, renowned for their expertise in developing tailored satellite constellations. This news was shared on August 7, 2025 through PRNewswire.

data.title: MSIG USA partners with Coalition to launch new cyber insurance offering for US clients, as of Aug 7, 2025.
data.description: On August 7, 2025, in New York, MSIG USA, a top specialty commercial insurance provider, revealed a key partnership with Coalition, the pioneering Active Insurance provider. This collaboration aims to introduce a fresh cyber insurance product for MSIG USA's clientele in the United States.

data.title: New tariffs imposed by Trump cause trade shock for crypto, impacting mining with global implications.
data.description: Analysts are cautioning that the recent implementation of new tariffs on a large number of countries could have widespread repercussions on investor confidence and crypto mining activities. The duties are impacting numerous nations, with a potential ripple effect on the global economy.Experts are emphasizing the need for careful monitoring of the situation to assess the full extent of the impact.

data.title: CCMP Growth Advisors acquires Airo Mechanical, a provider of HVAC and plumbing services in the Southeast US.
data.description: Airo Mechanical, a prominent company offering HVAC and plumbing installation services for multifamily and light commercial property developers and general contractors in the Southeastern United States, has recently been purchased by CCMP Growth Advisors, LP. CCMP Growth is a private equity firm that collaborates with rapidly growing industrial and consumer companies in the lower middle market. This acquisition marks a significant development for Airo as they aim to expand their operations under new ownership.

data.title: Mainstreet Equity Corp. achieves 15th straight quarter of double-digit growth: FFO up 10%, NOI up 16%, rental revenues up 10%.
data.description: Mainstreet Equity Corp. (TSX: MEQ) reported its 15th consecutive quarter of robust performance, showcasing a strong business model in the face of global economic instability. The company saw a 10% increase in Funds from operations (“FFO”), a 16% rise in net operating income (“NOI”), and a 10% growth in rental revenues. Additionally, same asset NOI surged by 12%, with same-asset revenues climbing by 6%. Operating margins also saw an uptick from 63.9% in Q3.

data.title: Janus International Group's Q2 2025 revenue: $228.1M, down 8.2% from Q2 2024's $248.4M. Leader in building product solutions.
data.description: Temple, Ga. - Janus International Group, Inc. (NYSE: JBI), a key player in building product solutions and advanced access control technologies for industries like self-storage and commercial sectors, revealed its fiscal Q2 results ending on June 28, 2025. The quarter saw revenues of $228.1 million, reflecting an 8.2% drop from the $248.4 million earned in Q2 of 2024. This decline was pegged at 14.8%. Janus continues to lead in delivering innovative solutions across various sectors.

data.title: uPerform appoints Dr. Stephanie Lahr as Chief Medical Officer to empower clinicians. ELKRIDGE, Md., Aug. 7, 2025.
data.description: An accomplished leader in health system and technology has been named as the first Chief Medical Officer of uPerform, a prominent just-in-time learning platform. Stephanie Lahr, M.D., CHCIO, will take on this role to support clinicians within the organization. The announcement was made on August 7, 2025 in Elkridge, Maryland. This news signifies a significant step for uPerform as they enhance their team with Dr. Lahr's expertise.

data.title: Americold announced Q2 2025 results, delivering $0.36 AFFO/share, with revenues at $650.7 million, net income at $1.6 million, and adjusted FFO at $103.6 million. The company outlined future growth plans and adjusted 2025 full-year outlook.
data.description: Americold Realty Trust, a leader in temperature-controlled logistics, reported financial results for Q2 2025, including a decrease in total revenues to $650.7 million, net income of $1.6 million, and Adjusted FFO per share of $0.36. The Company launched three innovative projects and updated its 2025 full-year outlook with an AFFO/share guidance range of $1.39 - $1.45. Global Warehouse segment same store revenues decreased by 1.5%, while Core EBITDA decreased to $159.1 million. The company is focused on cost control and capturing new opportunities amidst challenging demand. Three innovative projects were launched to drive future growth. The webcast and conference call discussed the results and future plans. Total revenues for the second quarter decreased by 1.5% due to lower volumes in the warehouse segment. The Company's 2025 guidance includes various metrics such as warehouse segment non-same store NOI of $7M - $13M and total maintenance capital expenditures of $60M - $70M. The global warehouse segment saw decrease in same store revenue and NOI but an increase in services margin. Non-same store warehouse revenues and NOI were $20,976 and $1,779 respectively. Overall, Americold Realty Trust continues to navigate headwinds and focus on operational efficiency and growth opportunities.

data.title: Cartesian Therapeutics: Q2 cash at $162.1M, Phase 3 trial for Descartes-08 initiated, Phase 2 data expected in 2H25. Cells-based autoimmune therapy in development.
data.description: Cartesian Therapeutics, Inc., a biotechnology company, reported financial results for Q2 of 2025, with $162.1 million in cash, expected to support operations until mid-2027. They initiated the Phase 3 AURORA trial of Descartes-08 in myasthenia gravis and are expecting data from a Phase 2 trial in systemic lupus erythematosus. They also plan to begin a Phase 2 pediatric basket trial of Descartes-08. Descartes-08, an autologous anti-B cell maturation antigen CAR-T therapy, has shown promising results and potential in treating autoimmune diseases. The Company also outlined plans for Descartes-15, a next-generation therapy. Financially, research and development expenses were $14.9 million, net income was $15.9 million, and they have various assets including property, research assets, and investments totaling $388.9 million. For more detailed financial info, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Celcuity Inc. (Nasdaq: CELC) to report Q2 2025 financial results on Aug 14, 2025; webcast at 4:30pm ET.
data.description: Celcuity Inc. (Nasdaq: CELC), a company specializing in targeted therapies for oncology, is set to disclose its financial performance for the second quarter of 2025 after markets close on August 14, 2025. This information will be accompanied by a webcast/teleconference at 4:30 p.m. Eastern Time on the same day, during which management will elaborate on the results and deliver a corporate update.

data.title: Appian reveals Q2 2025 financial performance, stay tuned for the numbers.
data.description: A recent report reveals that the unemployment rate in the US has decreased to 4.8% in the month of August. This marks a significant improvement compared to the previous month's rate of 5.4%. The report also highlights that the economy added 235,000 jobs in August, surpassing economists' expectations of 720,000 jobs. Despite concerns over the impact of the Delta variant on economic recovery, these numbers reflect a positive trend in the labor market. The leisure and hospitality sector showed the most growth, adding 74,000 jobs, followed by professional and business services with an increase of 60,000 jobs. These figures suggest a promising outlook for the US economy as it continues to recover from the effects of the pandemic.
